title: Sudden Valley, Gate 1, Furnished Two Bedroom Home
description:
*** AVAILABLE OCTOBER 1ST***

We are offering our beautiful fully furnished 2-bedroom, 2-1/2 bathroom home, with a wonderful view of Lake Whatcom, for lease month-to-month this winter. It is situated amidst tall pines, adjacent to beautiful Lake Whatcom in the Sudden Valley's pristine Gate 1 neighborhood. You're 15 minutes from Bellingham, about 90-minutes from Seattle, and only 65 miles from Mt Baker.

The property is located along a beautiful golf course, which is available to book if interested. The clubhouse has a bar and a Mexican restaurant, and there is a local grocery, gas station and a good pizza restaurant 1/2 mile away. A local fitness center is available, with tennis courts and outdoor pool. Outdoor recreation is shared with the local wildlife, as the deer are part of the community, so you will see them up close and often. Rabbits, squirrels, raccoon and a variety of birds also share the woods, but they are cautious, so less conspicuous. The community is safe, with security patrols, and a fire station less than 1/2 mile away. It's a beautiful place to call home, to either stroll in, or to relax on the deck with a cup of coffee or a glass of wine, or to enjoy after a long day exploring the nature trails or the nearby cascade mountains.

This Home is a non-smoking, no shoes space.
Utilities are negotiable.

title: cottage on shared land
description:
For Rent – Fragrance-free, separate, partially furnished, one bedroom, one bathroom cottage on shared land.
North Skagit County, close to the highway, but rural.

My wonderful renters have moved on, so the cottage will be available as soon as we make sure it’s clean and in good condition. Like I said, they’ve been great, so I am expecting the cottage will be available soon after that.

$1500 month includes water, recycling, and trash pickup. A mini split was installed last fall, so if you heat with that and the woodstove then electricity is included. If you add a bunch of space heaters, we’ll renegotiate. Renter is responsible for providing their own wood, but kindling and fallen wood can be picked up on the property.

This will be a month to month contract. Pets negotiable on a pet by pet basis. No smoking or vaping allowed. No fragrances of any sort. This last one is important and includes all fragranced products, not just perfumes, so the renter(s) and their guests will need to be using fragrance free personal and household products only.

The light is good and the furnishings are comfortable, antique, and fragrance free. While there is furniture,
there are no linens or kitchenware. There is the potential for shared organic garden space. A renter with truly fragrance free
clothing could share the laundry facilities in the main house.

Note, If you have applied and we have been in contact, but now I am not replying, there may be a problem with emails through Craigslist. Contact me through missed connections if we haven’t exchanged phone numbers.

With close proximity to WWU, our tenants are mostly all students.

Move in day is September 5th

Managed by RPM, we pride ourselves on our great customer service and fast response to tenants
